query:
SELECT
                g.agent_scope AS "key!",
                COUNT(*)::bigint AS "deny_count!"
            FROM governance_decisions g
            WHERE g.decision = 'deny'
              AND g.created_at >= $1 AND g.created_at < $2
              AND g.agent_scope IS NOT NULL
              AND g.agent_scope <> ''
            GROUP BY g.agent_scope
            ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
            LIMIT $3
